raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/year>, I ordered an item from a merchant called XXXX home with my American Express card by electronic means followed up by an in store visit. Several weeks later this merchant delivered the item. However, the item I received was not the correct item that I saw online, in store, or otherwise and therefore immediately refused delivery. The delivery team refused to take item. I immediately contacted the merchant during the delivery who totally ignored my texts, calls and emails. So I then filed a dispute with American Express. 

With no consideration for what I submitted into evidence not receiving the actual item I ordered and that the merchant was refusing to work with me directly regarding my issue they ruled in favor of the merchant. American Express failed to protect my purchase from the fraudulent and deceptive actions of said merchant. They allowed this merchant to provide me with merchandise other than what i ordered and failed to properly investigate this matter or review any evidence I submitted to them, and relied solely on the response of the merchant who response was completely false, misleading and disingenuous. In the 5 months of trying to have this matter properly investigated by American Express I discovered there is a huge disconnect between the back office dispute team that makes decisions and the agents who do the intake. The back office team does not review all of the notes or evidence provided by the card member, which is clearly evidence by their response. 

The failure of the back office team ( who is inaccessible to speak to card members ) to review evidence submitted by card member consequently operates at the disadvantage of card members and results in failure to properly and fully investigate disputes and allows for XXXX  and fraud. As a result I am requesting you review and investigate his American reviews disputes particularly when a dispute is reopened and additional information is submitted. It is my understanding and experience that once a dispute is closed the first time additional information is overlooked, disregarded and not be reviewed and disputes are summarily dismissed. 

Therefore American Express must be held accountable and reverse this charge of {$820.00} given they failed to protect my purchase from fraud.
